product_description: AI-powered organic growth platform that drives qualified traffic through SEO content, social distribution, and programmatic pages
what_product_does: Generates and distributes SEO-optimized content across channels to drive organic traffic and qualified leads for B2B SaaS companies
icp_description: B2B SaaS companies doing $1M-$50M ARR who want to build organic traffic without hiring large content teams
icp_pain_points: Content production is slow and expensive
Can't compete with enterprise content teams
Content quality is inconsistent at scale
brand_voice: Direct, sharp, zero-fluff. Talk like a growth operator, not a marketing textbook.
messaging_pillars: Organic is the only sustainable growth channel
AI content needs human-level quality control
mission: Make organic growth accessible to every B2B company without requiring enterprise budgets
approved_claims: Multi-channel distribution from single content piece
proof_points: Average 3x organic traffic growth in 6 months
Content quality scores above industry benchmarks
writing_style: Short sentences. Active voice. No corporate speak. Concrete over abstract. Show don't tell.
tone_guidelines: Confident but not arrogant. Technical but accessible. Opinionated with evidence.
dos: Reference real problems the ICP faces
Be direct about what works and what doesn't
Write like you're advising a peer, not lecturing a student
donts: Use fluffy intros or generic openings
target_action: Sign up for organic growth audit
author_pov: Growth practitioner who has built organic channels from scratch
